description_long: This object is a set of five modern smartphones, each with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front of each phone features a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top for the front-facing camera and sensors. The backs of the phones display a prominent Apple logo centered in the upper half, and a dual-camera module with two lenses and a flash arranged in a square bump at the top left corner. The devices are shown in a variety of colors: purple, blue, green, red, white, and black, each with a matching metallic or glass frame. The sides of the phones are flat, with visible buttons for volume and power, and the overall build appears to be a combination of glass and metal. These phones are typical of high-end consumer electronics and are commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A set of five colorful, modern smartphones with edge-to-edge glass screens, dual rear cameras, and flat metallic sides. Each phone features a prominent Apple logo and comes in purple, blue, green, red, white, and black.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profiles and color variety of the five smartphones.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large glass touchscreens, minimal bezels, and visible screen content.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the flat edges and color differences, with camera bumps slightly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the Apple logos, dual camera modules, and the full range of colors.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of each phone, clearly visible and contrasting with the phone's color.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screens display a colorful wallpaper with a gradient background, the time '9:41', the date 'Monday, June 22', and a few status icons at the top. No app icons or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Each phone has a dual camera module located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a square bump with two lenses and a flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides: a power button on the right edge and volume buttons on the left edge. The buttons are slim and rectangular.
